title: GPU hfft/ihfft + fftn/ifftn (3D)
description:
Spun out from #634 partial close. fft2/ifft2 landed via cufftPlan2d. Remaining cuFFT ops:

- hfft / ihfft (1-D Hermitian FFT) — wire on top of existing rfft/irfft with sign-flip kernel
- fftn / ifftn (N-D) — cufftPlan3d for 3-D, cufftPlanMany for arbitrary rank with strides

Both add new cufft.rs functions + dispatch wiring.
